description: The logo for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) displays the full text "Land Monitoring Service" in a light green sans-serif font. To the left of the text is an associated icon, also in light green, featuring an incomplete circular outline. Within this outline, two distinct elements are visible: on the left, an abstract representation of a city skyline with multiple rectangular shapes of varying heights, and on the right, a stylized wheat or grain ear.
